executive_summary: Latest updates from 25 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 8 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: How Iran is a victim of US-Israeli terrorism. Iran war Day 22: Trump weighs ground troops in Iran as Israel expands strikes to. key_developments.headline: Iranian missiles injure 180 in towns near Israeli nuclear site
key_developments.detail: Israel's health ministry says 180 people were injured - some seriously - in Iranian missile strikes on two southern Israeli towns close to a nuclear facility. key_developments.headline: UK sees no evidence of Iran targeting Britain, says Starmer
key_developments.detail: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said on Monday there had been no assessment that mainland Britain was being targeted by Iran. key_developments.headline: Iran says coastal attack will lead to full Gulf closure and mine-laying
key_developments.detail: An attack on Iran's southern coast and islands will lead to Gulf routes being cut with the laying of sea mines, the country's Defence Council said on Monday, according to state media. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
